name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - CFSC Currency Exchange Wilson & Broadway Check Cashing and Auto License (Chicago)
description_short: Chicago, IL's CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM at 4559 N Broadway inside CFSC Currency Exchange provides crypto access and currency exchange services.
description_long:
Located at 4559 N Broadway in Chicago, IL, this CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM operates inside CFSC Currency Exchange Wilson & Broadway Check Cashing and Auto License. The storefront sits on Chicago's busy north side Broadway corridor with street-level access. Hours of operation are Monday through Friday 6 AM to 10 PM, Saturday 8 AM to 7 PM, and Sunday 9 AM to 5 PM.

This Chicago location offers Bitcoin ATM services, currency exchange transactions, check cashing, and auto license document assistance. The on-site staff can answer questions about services and rates. Call (773) 800-0106 to confirm availability or pricing before visiting with your ID and funds.

For Chicago residents seeking evening cryptocurrency access, this N Broadway location stays open until 10 PM on weekdays—longer than most traditional ATM networks. Bring valid ID for any transaction. The ATM is part of the broader CoinFlip network, but each location operates according to its host store's specific hours and policies.
pros: Extended operating hours from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM weekdays, 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM Saturday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Sunday
High daily transaction limit of up to $15,000 per day with a CoinFlip Account
24/7 customer support available via phone (1-877-757-2646) and email
CoinFlip Account feature allows pre-registration to save time on in-person transactions
Multiple cryptocurrency options beyond Bitcoin available for purchase
Hosted at established CFSC Currency Exchange location, providing physical credibility
Mobile CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app for managing digital assets
cons: Specific fee structure and rates not disclosed on the location page
No mention of sell/redemption services; appears limited to cash-to-crypto purchases only
Requires downloading a separate wallet app before first transaction, creating additional steps
Transaction timing unclear—page doesn't specify how long it takes to receive purchased cryptocurrency
Limited details on which specific cryptocurrencies are available for purchase at this location
best_for: First-time cryptocurrency buyers seeking immediate cash conversion to digital assets
Repeat Bitcoin/crypto purchasers who want to bypass traditional banking intermediaries
Customers already using CFSC Currency Exchange who want to explore cryptocurrency
Tech-savvy individuals comfortable with crypto wallets and digital asset custody
diagnosis: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM is best for customers seeking quick, cash-based cryptocurrency purchases at a physical location without traditional banking intermediaries. The main caveat is that this is a straightforward cryptocurrency ATM service, not a consumer finance product—it's designed for crypto adoption, not financial assistance, debt relief, or credit building.
services: Multiple cryptocurrency purchases (specific coins not listed)
CoinFlip Account creation for repeat customers
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app download and setup
Same-location currency exchange services via CFSC
Check cashing via host CFSC venue
